descript.abstract: This data release contains the data extracted from the commodity chapters in the USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries 2026.
descript.purpose: Published on an annual basis, the USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries report is the earliest Government publication to furnish estimates covering nonfuel mineral industry data. Data sheets contain information on the domestic industry structure, Government programs, tariffs, and 5-year salient statistics for over 90 individual minerals and materials.
descript.supplinf: Where possible, data are those finalized for publication in the 2024 U.S. Geological Survey Minerals Yearbook Volume I - Metals and Minerals. For 2025, USGS National Minerals Information Center provided estimates based on available data from USGS surveys of the minerals industry, other industry sources, and mineral commodity specialist research.

idinfo.accconst: None. Please see 'Distribution Info' for details.
idinfo.useconst: These data are marked with a Creative Common CC0 1.0 Universal License. These data are in the public domain and do not have any use constraints. Users are advised to read the dataset's metadata thoroughly to understand appropriate use and data limitations.

cntaddr.address: National Center, John W Powell FB

citeinfo.title: USGS National Minerals Information Center Mineral Commodity Web Page
citeinfo.othercit: Provides information and links to all available USGS National Minerals Information Center publications for all mineral commodities by publication type and year.

attracc.attraccr: Where possible, data for all years except 2024 have been finalized for publication in the U.S. Geological Survey Minerals Yearbook Volume I - Metals and Minerals; otherwise, the data are noted as estimated.

dataqual.logic: Data were checked to ensure that they matched those published in the U.S. Geological Survey's Mineral Commodity Summaries 2026 (MCS 2026). Data were peer-reviewed by Mineral Commodity Specialists and approved by supervisors in compliance with USGS fundamental science practices.
dataqual.complete: This data release contains tabular data found in the associated publication Mineral Commodity Summaries 2026 (MCS 2026); additional detailed information is available in the full text version of MCS 2026.

citeinfo.title: USGS Minerals Yearbook Volume I - Metals and Minerals

srcinfo.srccontr: Source of statistics for 2021 - 2024. The data in the Minerals Yearbook are based on USGS surveys sent to companies involved in the industry for each mineral commodity.

procstep.procdesc: Data for each mineral commodity were compiled from published 2024 U.S. Geological Survey Minerals Yearbook Volume I - Metals and Minerals chapters or from preliminary tables of those to be published. Data for 2025 were estimated based on available 2025 data and industry trends. Estimates for world production were made for 2025 in collaboration with USGS National Minerals Information Center Global Minerals Analysis specialists using best available data.

enttyp.enttypd: Comma Separated Value (CSV) file containing data.

attr.attrdef: Mineral commodity for which the data were compiled.
Country in which the mineral commodity is produced or processed.

codesetd.codesets: Geopolitical Entities, Names, and Codes (GENC) Standard

edom.edomvd: XX - World totals cannot be calculated because production and reserves are not reported in a consistent manner by all countries. W - Withheld s - small NA - not available E - Net exporter — - zero

overview.eaover: World Production data were compiled from the U.S. Geological Survey's Minerals Yearbooks in one single file. Units may vary by commodity - the user of the data must select mineral commodities having similar units if comparing quantities.
overview.eadetcit: World Production data set accompanying the U.S. Geological Survey Appendices for the Methodology and Technical Input for the 2025 Review and Revision of the U.S. Critical Minerals List.

cntaddr.address: Denver Federal Center, Building 810, Mail Stop 302

distinfo.distliab: Unless otherwise stated, all data, metadata and related materials are considered to satisfy the quality standards relative to the purpose for which the data were collected. Although these data and associated metadata have been reviewed for accuracy and completeness and approved for release by the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS), no warranty expressed or implied is made regarding the display or utility of the data on any other system or for general or scientific purposes, nor shall the act of distribution constitute any such warranty.

cntaddr.address: National Center, John W Powell FB

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
